---
name: Feature request
about: Idea for the product or roadmap
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What you want**
A clear one-line summary.

**Why it matters**
Which pain point or use case (e.g. signals, scenarios, systems, workflow).

**Possible solution**
Rough idea of how it could work (optional).

**Priority**
How important to you: must-have / nice-to-have / later.
